description_long: This hardware store is a multi-story commercial building with a rectangular footprint and a steeply pitched, shingled roof featuring three prominent dormer windows. The facade is primarily white, with large, grid-patterned windows on one side and rows of smaller windows on the main face, suggesting multiple floors. The side of the building is clad in a brick or stone texture, adding visual contrast and a sense of durability. The main entrance appears to be located on the side with the larger windows, which may also serve as display areas for merchandise. The roof's dormers and the overall symmetry of the window arrangement give the building a traditional, utilitarian appearance. No visible signage or exterior displays are present, and the structure is solidly built, likely intended for high foot traffic and storage of heavy goods.
description: A multi-story, white commercial hardware store with a steep shingled roof, dormer windows, and large display windows on the facade. The building features a mix of brick and white paneling, giving it a sturdy, traditional look.
description_view_0: The underside of the building is visible, showing a recessed, angular base with no windows or doors.
description_view_1: This view highlights the main facade with large display windows and rows of smaller windows, suggesting the front of the store.
description_view_2: The steeply pitched, shingled roof with three dormer windows is prominent, and the brick-textured side wall is visible.
description_view_3: A clear view of the white facade with multiple rows of windows and the large display windows, as well as the side dormers protruding from the roof.
attribute_storefront_layout: The storefront features large display windows on one side and rows of smaller windows on the main facade, with no visible signage or exterior displays. The entrance is likely located near the larger windows, and the roof includes three dormer windows.
